blockingIssues.description: Implementation files are uncommitted. The handoff commitId (9d5a036) is an unrelated browser documentation commit. Files untracked: src/state/discovery-memory-store.ts, tests/browser/discovery-memory-store.test.ts, tests/state/discovery-memory-store.test.ts. File unstaged: src/contracts.ts. The feature needs to be committed before it can pass review. The code itself is correct and all tests pass.

nonBlockingIssues.description: VAL-LOOP-ATS-001 (ATS seeding independent of planner output) has no dedicated named test. Implicitly covered by pre-existing test 'runDiscovery uses configured ATS companies even when the broad company planner returns zero companies'.
VAL-LOOP-BROWSER-004/005 are covered only via inline comments referencing implicit coverage from other tests, not dedicated test cases.
Test fixture THIRD_PARTY_HOSTS (17 hosts) is a subset of implementation THIRD_PARTY_JOB_BOARD_HOSTS (30+ hosts). Some third-party hosts lack dedicated test coverage.
Canonical seed expansion skips already-canonical careers/listings pages (grounded-search.ts:1450). Low-risk edge case since grounded search rarely returns direct careers URLs as initial candidates.
VAL-LOOP-BROWSER-005 lacks a dedicated named test; coverage relies on existing tests pointed to by comments.
ScoutObservationRecord types duplicated between contracts.ts and discovery-memory-store.ts. Consistent with existing project pattern but creates maintenance risk.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Browser Scout Policy Classification section and Memory Store Architecture section to architecture.md documenting the 3-tier policy model, canonical extraction gate, and memory store table structure.
Added Droid-Shield false-positive pattern documentation to environment.md explaining *Ref/*Id naming convention for non-secret fields.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the *Ref naming convention guidance to apply to all code (not just tests/fixtures). Current wording: 'In tests/fixtures, avoid non-secret field names ending with Key'. Should be: 'In all code, avoid non-secret field names ending with Key (prefer *Ref/*Id) to prevent Droid-Shield false-positive commit blocking.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wave2-memory-scout-observations worker applied the convention to production contracts.ts types (ScoutObservationRecord) but AGENTS.md only mentions tests/fixtures scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'verify existing implementation' branch to loop-browser-worker skill for cases where the implementation is already in place and the worker only needs to add tests/documentation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wave2-browser-canonical-seed-expansion worker found implementation already existed and only added documentation comments. The skill assumes greenfield implementation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pass2 review gap about canonical seed expansion for already-canonical careers pages not being addressed.
rejectedObservations.reason: Low-risk edge case. Grounded search rarely returns direct careers URLs as initial candidates. Not a systemic issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: ScoutObservationRecord type duplication between contracts.ts and discovery-memory-store.ts.
rejectedObservations.reason: Consistent with existing project pattern (other types like CompanyRegistryRecord are similarly duplicated). Non-blocking maintenance concern, not a code review issue.
